name: Network Error Recovery
title: Network Error Recovery
purpose: Verify the agent degrades gracefully when evidence providers are unavailable.
prompt: Build a real-time collaboration tool for remote teams.
setup: Evidence providers (web search, GitHub API) are unavailable or return errors. No cached evidence exists.
steps: Present the prompt to the agent.
Confirm it detects the network error without crashing.
Check that it produces provisional evidence and a low-confidence decision.
Verify it does not fabricate specific evidence details.
expected: The agent degrades to provisional evidence, returns Low confidence, does not crash.
